channel.title: Iac on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Iac on Mike Ball

item.title: Verifying and validating Terraform: techniques for testing infrastructure-as-code
item.description: An overview of techniques for testing Terraform, from linting to end-to-end testing.

item.title: Terraform: natively reading GitHub release assets
item.description: Reading release assets in Terraform via the `github_release_asset` data source.

item.title: Terraform: self-validating plan-time permissions checks
item.description: How can a Terraform configuration test whether it has sufficient access to do its own work?

item.title: Packer: conditionally omit HCL block configuration
item.description: Conditionally configure AWS EC2 launch block device mappings in a Packer template.

item.title: Terraform Patterns: the wrapper module
item.description: An overview of the Terraform wrapper module pattern.

item.title: Scalable Terraform Patterns: Reuse and Repeatability
item.description: An overview of native Terraform constructs enabling reuse and repeatability.

item.title: Scalable Terraform patterns: compound workspace names
item.description: My overview of the Terraform compound workspace name pattern.

item.title: Automated Terraform Plan Analysis With Terratest
item.description: How can terratest be used to automate Terraform plan analysis?
